# Manifest of cmake-xray M6 JSON report goldens (AP M6-1.2 Tranche A.1).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one golden file in this
# directory. tests/validate_json_schema.py checks that the manifest and the
# directory contents agree, and validates each listed golden against
# spec/report-json.schema.json (format_version=2).
#
# Coverage per plan-M6-1-2.md "E2E-/Golden-Tests":
#   analyze-compile-db-only.json  -> not_loaded, empty graph, empty hubs
#   analyze-file-api-loaded.json  -> loaded, multiple edges, at least one hub
#   analyze-file-api-partial.json -> partial, one external edge, partial diagnostic
#   impact-compile-db-only.json   -> not_loaded, empty graph (impact has no hubs)
#   impact-file-api-loaded.json   -> loaded, multiple edges
#   impact-file-api-partial.json  -> partial, one external edge
analyze-compile-db-only.json
analyze-file-api-loaded.json
analyze-file-api-partial.json
impact-compile-db-only.json
impact-file-api-loaded.json
impact-file-api-partial.json
impact-not-loaded.json
impact-prioritised-cycle.json
impact-prioritised-default.json
impact-prioritised-depth-zero.json
impact-prioritised-partial.json
